title: Mod Menu Updater
description: An add-on for Mod Menu that brings the feature of updating your mods from within the game
body:
This mod integrates directly into the Mod Menu screen, allowing you to download the latest versions of your mods with a single click.

✨ Features:
- In-Game Updating: Adds an "Update" button next to any mod with a pending update on Modrinth.
- Bulk Update: Adds an "Update All" button to download everything at once.
- Seamless Integration: Designed to look and feel exactly like a native part of Mod Menu.
- Safe Backups: Automatically moves the old version of the mod to a backups folder before installing the new one.
- Auto-Cleanup: Old backups are automatically cleaned up on the next game launch to save space.

ℹ️ How it works:
- Click Update on a mod.
- The new .jar is downloaded instantly.
- Restart your game to apply the changes.
